title: ursinia arida
intro: Ursinia arida, also known as the Yellow Daisy or Grey-leafed Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub-like perennial plant native to southern Africa, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant has been traditionally used to treat ailments such as indigestion, fever, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Ursinia arida include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
